trim: All trims (Sport, Willys Sport, Sport S, Willys, Sahara, Rubicon, 392)
engine: Gasoline: 3.6L Pentastar V6, 2.0L Turbo I4, 6.4L HEMI V8 (392); Separate schedule for 3.0L EcoDiesel
transmission: Automatic (8-speed) or Manual (6-speed on select trims)
source: 2021 Jeep Wrangler Owner's Manual — SCHEDULED SERVICING GASOLINE ENGINE section, pages 296–300

maintenance.service: Oil Change Indicator reset + routine oil-change bundle (change oil and filter, rotate tires on irregular wear, inspect battery, inspect CV/Universal joints, inspect brake system, inspect engine cooling system, inspect exhaust, inspect/replace engine air cleaner filter)

interval.logic: OLM (Oil Life Monitor) driven; NEVER exceed 10,000 miles, 12 months, or 350 engine run hours — whichever comes first. 350 hours primarily a fleet concern.

maintenance.notes: System-driven. 'Change Oil' / 'Oil Change Required' message illuminates based on engine operating conditions (short trips, towing, extreme temperatures). Service within next 500 mi (805 km) of message. Dealer resets indicator; non-dealer reset documented at Instrument Cluster Display page 103.

maintenance.service: Monthly / pre-long-trip inspection: check engine oil level, windshield washer fluid, tire pressures & wear (rotate on irregular wear), coolant/brake master cylinder/power steering fluid levels, all interior & exterior light function

interval.logic: Once every month or before any long trip

maintenance.service: Lubricate door hinge joints (white lithium grease)
maintenance.notes: Per manual NOTE: 'Using white lithium grease, lubricate the door hinge joints twice a year to prevent premature wear.' Also inspect all door latches for grease at every oil-change interval; reapply if necessary.

interval.logic: Every 20,000 miles / 24 months; at every 10k mi oil-change milestone in practice

maintenance.service: Inspect front suspension, tie rod ends, rear suspension; replace if necessary
Inspect front and rear axle fluid
maintenance.notes: Table X marks at: 20k, 60k, 100k, 140k, 160k, 200k, 220k. Change required under special conditions: police, taxi, fleet, off-road, or frequent trailer towing.

maintenance.service: Inspect brake linings, rotors, drums, hoses, and parking brake; adjust parking brake on 4-wheel disc brake models
maintenance.notes: Replace brake linings as necessary. Parking brake adjustment at same interval for 4-wheel disc models.
Change transfer case fluid under severe duty: police, taxi, fleet, or frequent trailer towing.
Inspect at every oil-change interval under dusty/off-road conditions; replace as necessary even if before 30k mi.
In heavy traffic, dirt, dust, urban or desert areas may require earlier replacement.

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs — 2.0L Turbo I4 only

interval.logic: 30,000 miles (mileage-based only; yearly/months intervals DO NOT apply per manual footnote **)

maintenance.notes: Applies to 2.0L Turbo I4 engine only. Footnote: spark plug change interval is mileage based only; yearly intervals do not apply.

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs — 3.6L Pentastar V6 and 6.4L HEMI V8 (392)

interval.logic: 60,000 miles (mileage-based only; yearly/months intervals DO NOT apply per manual footnote **)

maintenance.notes: Applies to 3.6L and 6.4L engines only. Same footnote: mileage-based only, yearly intervals do not apply.

maintenance.service: Flush and replace engine and intercooler (if equipped) coolant

interval.logic: 10 years or 150,000 miles (240,000 km), whichever comes first

maintenance.notes: Also shown at 240,000 miles as part of replacement cycle; do not exceed 10 years or 150k mi.

maintenance.service: Change manual transmission fluid — special conditions only

interval.logic: Required every 30,000 miles (when manual transmission equipped AND operating under special conditions)

maintenance.notes: Required if using vehicle for: trailer towing, snow plowing, heavy loading, taxi, police, delivery service (commercial), off-road/desert operation, or >50% sustained high speeds above 90°F (32°C). Not required under normal use.

maintenance.service: Inspect and replace PCV valve if necessary
Change front and rear axle fluid — special conditions only
maintenance.notes: Required if using vehicle for: police, taxi, fleet, off-road, or frequent trailer towing.
Per maintenance table page 301 (diesel section shares similar layout).

maintenance.service: Change transfer case fluid — normal use
maintenance.notes: Page 301 table entry. Under severe duty (police/taxi/fleet/frequent towing): see interval above for severe duty (60k mi).

diesel_section_note.note: Separate diesel maintenance schedule (3.0L EcoDiesel engine) appears at pages 299–302. OIL CHANGE limit is stricter: max 10,000 miles or 12 months (no 350-hour exception). DEF fill required at every oil change. Fuel filter & water drain at every oil change. Biodiesel >5% (B6-B20) states (e.g. Minnesota summer): oil changes and fuel filter must not exceed 8,000 miles or 6 months. Diesel schedule NOT merged into this file.

applicability: All 2021 Jeep Wrangler gasoline engines (3.6L V6, 2.0L I4 Turbo, 6.4L HEMI V8 392)
Normal duty schedule; special operating condition overrides exist for several items
validation_flags: Primary source: 2021 Jeep Wrangler Owner's Manual PDF (pages 296-300 gasoline; 299-302 diesel)
Tables were not parsable by pdfplumber (empty); text extracted via pdftotext with -layout option
Hermes reported rendering pages 298-300 for visual inspection; those generated images are not included in this review package.
OLM (oil-life monitor) rule: max 10,000 mi / 12 months / 350 hours NEVER exceeded even if indicator has not triggered
Spark plug replacement: mileage-based ONLY for both 2.0L (30k) and 3.6L (60k); yearly intervals do not apply per manual footnote
Manual transmission fluid change is special-duty only — NOT a normal-use interval
Front/rear axle fluid change is special-duty only (police/taxi/fleet/off-road/frequent towing)
Transfer case fluid inspection at 60k/60mo (normal); change at 150k/120mo (normal use) or 60k/60mo (severe duty)
Diesel schedule intentionally excluded from this file — requires separate entry
Do not apply schedules from other model years or JL-based models
Verify intervals against actual rendered PDF pages before production use
extraction_method: pdftotext -layout + visual PNG inspection (pages 298-300). pdfplumber returned tables_count=0; target pages identified and rendered as PNGs for visual inspection.
